== Notes for [[Item:Q105832|Q105832]] ==

Notes by Mulla Saadullah Saheb:...Imaam e Husain's wife Laila binte Abu Murrah is known by awaam as umme Laila . which is not true . her name was Laila ,<nowiki>----</nowiki>umme Sayyidna Ali e Akbar ,who achieved hiss Shahaadat just before Imaam e Husain at karbala -Yaume Ashura....as per Sayyidna Qazi un Nu'maan.

Source: http://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/Layla_bint_Abi_Murrah_al-Thaqafi

REFERENCE_NUMBERS:
geni:6000000014649842909

[[Category:GEDCOM Notes Pages]][[Category:Pages]]
